name: death
label: Death
gloss: A character dies as direct consequence of the protagonist's action or inaction; the relation is permanently extinguished
act_iii_phrasing: the death they could not prevent has, by then, already happened
plain_language: Someone is dead because of what the protagonist did or did not do

name: public_statement
label: Public Statement
gloss: The protagonist makes a declaration in public the credibility of which cannot be retracted
act_iii_phrasing: the statement they made on the record cannot be unmade now
plain_language: The microphone has been opened and the words are now in the air

name: lost_document
label: Lost Document
gloss: A legal medical or evidentiary document is destroyed forged or permanently lost
act_iii_phrasing: the document is in the fire and the fire is out
plain_language: The paper that proved the case has been burned

name: pregnancy
label: Pregnancy
gloss: A pregnancy begins; the prior dyad and prior life path no longer exists
act_iii_phrasing: the body has decided what the protagonist had not yet agreed to
plain_language: The test has read two lines and there is no taking that back

name: crossing_a_border
label: Crossing a Border
gloss: The protagonist enters a territory physical legal or social that cannot be returned from without catastrophic cost
act_iii_phrasing: the border closes behind them at the hour the train pulls out of the station
plain_language: They have walked across a line that closes when they finish crossing

name: killing_the_messenger
label: Killing the Messenger
gloss: The single witness who held the resolving information is silenced before transmission
act_iii_phrasing: the only person who could have spoken stops returning the protagonist's calls
plain_language: The one person who knew the answer has gone silent

name: burned_bridge
label: Burned Bridge
gloss: The protagonist destroys an alliance institution or relationship that cannot be rebuilt
act_iii_phrasing: the resignation letter is on the desk and the desk is no longer theirs
plain_language: They have said the unforgivable thing in public and there is no walking it back

name: sealed_container
label: Sealed Container
gloss: The protagonist or others is enclosed in a space legal structure or information blackout from which exit needs external action
act_iii_phrasing: the door has clamped shut and the only key is on the wrong side of it
plain_language: They are locked in a place only someone outside can open

name: spoken_vow
label: Spoken Vow
gloss: The protagonist makes a verbal commitment in a context where breaking it carries catastrophic moral or legal cost
act_iii_phrasing: the words have left the protagonist's mouth into the witness's hearing
plain_language: They have promised it out loud in front of someone who heard

name: made_public
label: Made Public
gloss: Information that was private is released into a public sphere from which it cannot be recalled
act_iii_phrasing: the file was uploaded eight minutes ago and the mirrors are already replicating
plain_language: The secret has been published and it cannot be un-published

name: fingerprint_match
label: Fingerprint Match
gloss: Forensic legal or documentary evidence definitively identifies the protagonist as the agent of a prior act
act_iii_phrasing: the match came back from the lab and it is their name on the slip
plain_language: A record from the past has just confirmed who they are

name: genie_out_of_bottle
label: Genie Out of Bottle
gloss: The protagonist releases a force idea technology or biological agent that propagates autonomously
act_iii_phrasing: the thing they let out is now in the world and the bottle is empty
plain_language: The thing they set loose is loose and they cannot recall it
